visual_description: A man in a light-colored jacket walks through a dimly lit alley while holding a phone to his ear, with several other men trailing behind him. The alley is lined with stalls covered by colorful posters and illuminated by a single overhead light, casting shadows on the wet ground.
audio_description: A faint phone conversation is audible as the man speaks, accompanied by distant street noise and the footsteps of the group.
